name: hydra
description: HYDRA — 402-native paid work engine. 40 MCP tools: web extraction, search, HTML-to-Markdown, DNS/SSL/URL checks, hash, encode, diff, JSON/CSV conversion, Wikipedia, arXiv, SEC EDGAR, regulatory intelligence, prediction markets, FOMC data, oracle feeds.

install.claude_code: claude mcp add --transport http hydra https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/mcp
